channel.title: SmartHomeMade
channel.description: Your guide to building a smarter home. Reviews, guides, and tips for smart home devices, automation, and connected living.

item.title: Alexa vs Google Home in 2026: Which Smart Assistant Actually Wins?
item.description: A no-BS comparison of Amazon Alexa and Google Home in 2026. We compare sound quality, smart home control, AI features, pricing, and more.

item.title: Best Smart Plugs in 2026: Top 7 Picks for Every Budget
item.description: Looking for the best smart plugs? We tested and compared the top options for Alexa, Google Home, and Apple HomeKit. Here are our picks for 2026.

item.title: Smart Home Beginners Guide: How to Start in 2026 (Without Wasting Money)
item.description: New to smart homes? This step-by-step guide shows you exactly what to buy first, how to set it up, and how to avoid the most common beginner mistakes.
